2025/26 Season · Gameweek 34

Dallas Premier League

12-team Sleeper EPL dynasty fantasy

Featured Manager · GW34

brendog2814 erupts into second

A 118-point GW34 vaults him into clear possession of runner-up

brendog2814 has been the quiet contender all season, hovering just behind the leaders without ever quite breaking through. That changed in GW34 with a 118.75-point explosion against benditlikebergvall, his third-highest week of the year, that moved him past Noahvillasana17 on tiebreakers and into sole second place. With erozier holding a comfortable two-game cushion at the top, the real story for the remaining four weeks is the three-way fight for second between brendog2814, JordiCarb, and Noahvillasana17, all 20-14 but separated by 230 points-for. brendog2814's offense leads that group; now he just needs to keep his foot on the gas.
